needs.note: KB reference files are about data modeling methods
Visual guide is a design artifact

stages.name: kb-population
stages.description: Create 8 reference files in ../laecon/kb/references/ extracting values from Constitution Art. 10 §3, plus update kb/README.md.
success_criteria: All 8 .md files exist at specified paths
Each file contains reference values extracted from Constitution Art. 10 §3
kb/README.md updated with index of reference files

stages.name: visual-guide
stages.description: Create a single HTML file covering basic statistics → OLS → GLM → ordered models → validation → feature selection → trees → interpretability → advanced roadmap. Focus on Python packages, parameters, when-to-use decisions.
deliverables: Single HTML file in project artifacts
success_criteria: Covers all 9 topic areas in specified sequence

three_q.rationale: Mixed reasoning types (extract for KB, synthesize for guide) across two deliverables. Each sub-task is 3/3 independently.

conjunction.evidence: Implicit 'and' between KB files and visual guide deliverables

multi_owns.evidence: KB files → data-architect (latade), visual guide → dashboard-designer (ladesign). Cross-capability split required.
